question: 이번 달 신규 가입자 수는?
expectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM customers WHERE signup_at >= date_trunc('month', now())

question: VIP 고객 명단을 보여줘
expectedSql: SELECT name, email FROM customers WHERE is_vip = true

question: 재고가 0인 상품을 알려줘
expectedSql: SELECT name, stock FROM products WHERE stock = 0

question: 카테고리별 상품 개수를 알려줘
expectedSql: SELECT c.name, COUNT(p.id) AS product_count FROM categories c LEFT JOIN products p ON p.category_id = c.id GROUP BY c.name ORDER BY product_count DESC

question: 도시별 고객 수를 보여줘
expectedSql: SELECT city, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM customers GROUP BY city ORDER BY cnt DESC

question: 전체 주문 합계 금액은?
expectedSql: SELECT SUM(total) AS total_revenue FROM orders WHERE status = 'completed'

question: 지난 30일간 주문이 가장 많은 고객 5명
expectedSql: SELECT c.name, COUNT(o.id) AS order_count FROM customers c JOIN orders o ON o.customer_id = c.id WHERE o.created_at >= now() - interval '30 days' GROUP BY c.id, c.name ORDER BY order_count DESC LIMIT 5

question: VIP 고객의 최근 주문 10건을 보여줘
expectedSql: SELECT c.name, o.id, o.total, o.created_at FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON c.id = o.customer_id WHERE c.is_vip = true ORDER BY o.created_at DESC LIMIT 10

question: Electronics 카테고리 상품의 평균 평점을 알려줘
expectedSql: SELECT AVG(r.rating) AS avg_rating FROM reviews r JOIN products p ON p.id = r.product_id JOIN categories c ON c.id = p.category_id WHERE c.name = 'Electronics'

question: 지난 분기 매출 상위 고객 10명과 그 매출액을 알려줘
expectedSql: SELECT c.name, SUM(o.total) AS revenue FROM customers c JOIN orders o ON o.customer_id = c.id WHERE o.created_at >= date_trunc('quarter', now()) - interval '3 months' AND o.created_at < date_trunc('quarter', now()) AND o.status = 'completed' GROUP BY c.id, c.name ORDER BY revenue DESC LIMIT 10

question: 카테고리별 매출 합계를 매출이 높은 순으로
expectedSql: SELECT c.name, SUM(oi.unit_price * oi.quantity) AS revenue FROM order_items oi JOIN products p ON p.id = oi.product_id JOIN categories c ON c.id = p.category_id GROUP BY c.id, c.name ORDER BY revenue DESC

question: 월별 주문 수와 전월 대비 증감을 알려줘
expectedSql: WITH monthly AS (SELECT date_trunc('month', created_at) AS m, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM orders GROUP BY 1) SELECT m, cnt, cnt - LAG(cnt) OVER (ORDER BY m) AS delta FROM monthly ORDER BY m

question: 각 고객의 첫 구매 일자와 평균 주문 금액
expectedSql: SELECT c.name, MIN(o.created_at) AS first_order, AVG(o.total) AS avg_total FROM customers c JOIN orders o ON o.customer_id = c.id GROUP BY c.id, c.name

question: 최근 매출은 어때?
expectedSql: SELECT SUM(total) AS revenue FROM orders WHERE created_at >= now() - interval '30 days' AND status = 'completed'
notes: Ambiguous '최근'. M2 clarification gate would ask. M1 must default to 30 days.

question: How many products are out of stock?
expectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM products WHERE stock = 0

question: Average order value per status
expectedSql: SELECT status, AVG(total) AS avg_total, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM orders GROUP BY status

question: Top 5 best-selling products by quantity sold
expectedSql: SELECT p.name, SUM(oi.quantity) AS total_qty FROM order_items oi JOIN products p ON p.id = oi.product_id GROUP BY p.id, p.name ORDER BY total_qty DESC LIMIT 5

question: Customers in Seoul who placed more than 3 orders this year
expectedSql: SELECT c.name, COUNT(o.id) AS cnt FROM customers c JOIN orders o ON o.customer_id = c.id WHERE c.city = 'Seoul' AND o.created_at >= date_trunc('year', now()) GROUP BY c.id, c.name HAVING COUNT(o.id) > 3

question: Products with average rating above 4 and at least 3 reviews
expectedSql: SELECT p.name, AVG(r.rating) AS avg_rating, COUNT(r.id) AS review_count FROM products p JOIN reviews r ON r.product_id = p.id GROUP BY p.id, p.name HAVING COUNT(r.id) >= 3 AND AVG(r.rating) > 4 ORDER BY avg_rating DESC

question: Show me the orders
expectedSql: SELECT id, customer_id, status, total, created_at FROM orders ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 100
notes: Highly ambiguous. M1 must default to LIMIT 100 most recent.
